title: Aider
copyText:
## Editorial notes

Aider is a practical option for developers who want tight Git-centered AI editing without adopting a new editor.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
detailMarkdown:
# Aider
Open-source terminal coding assistant that edits files in Git repositories using chat-driven development loops.

**Author:** Aider

**Tags:** `terminal-agent` `open-source`
